title: SSO Troubleshooting
body: Common SSO errors include invalid audience, missing NameID, and certificate expiry. Verify IdP metadata, role mapping, and SCIM provisioning logs. If users see a redirect loop, confirm ACS URL and relay state settings. Example: Firefox scenario.

title: Report Data Freshness
body: Dashboards update after nightly ETL (02:00 local) and incremental jobs every 2 hours. For stale metrics, validate ETL completion and refresh cached aggregates. Time zone mismatch can cause 'yesterday' filters to return unexpected results. Example: Edge scenario.

title: CSV Import Template
body: Imports require ISO date format YYYY-MM-DD; avoid locale formats like MM/DD/YYYY. Use UTF-8 encoding; remove formulas; ensure headers match the template exactly. Dry-run mode returns row-level validation errors for quick remediation. Example: Edge scenario.

title: API Rate Limits
body: Rate limiting returns HTTP 429 with Retry-After and X-RateLimit headers. Implement exponential backoff and request batching where possible. Rotate tokens and confirm scopes when receiving 401 responses. Example: Firefox scenario.

title: Entitlements and Seats
body: Seat limit errors occur when allocated users exceed purchased entitlements. If a feature is disabled unexpectedly, refresh entitlements after SKU changes. Billing corrections require contract verification and invoice adjustment workflow. Example: Chrome scenario.

title: UI Troubleshooting
body: Browser cache and extensions can affect rendering; test in incognito mode. If modals overlap, capture viewport size and browser version. Console logs and network traces help isolate regressions. Example: Chrome scenario.
